title: rubus hirtus var. trachyadenes
intro: Rubus hirtus var. trachyadenes, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to the Himalayan region. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. trachyadenes include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
